name: Wing Tai Properties Limited
summary: Wing Tai Properties Limited, an investment holding company, invests in, develops, and manages properties in Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, the People's Republic of China, Singapore, and internationally. The company operates through Property Development, Property Investment and Management, Hospitality Investment and Management, and Others divisions. It develops and manages residential and commercial properties. The company's investment properties include office buildings, industrial buildings, car parking spaces, retail spaces, and serviced apartments. It is also involved in the hospitality management, investment, licensing, treasury investment, financing, and property agency activities. The company was formerly known as USI Holdings Limited and changed its name to Wing Tai Properties Limited in 2010. Wing Tai Properties Limited is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
